title: senecio julianus
intro: Senecio julianus, also known as Fern-leaf Ragwort or Dwarf Ragwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. Senecio julianus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, although its toxicity and safety in large doses or prolonged use should be carefully considered.
